title: Apple May Soon Launch Subscription-Style Leasing Program for iPhones, Macs
summary: Apple already has a similar program for iPhone purchases, called iPhone Upgrade . While the iPhone Upgrade program includes Apple’s device protection, the rumored, upcoming Apple Upgrade program will not.
